targets.rawSql: SELECT value FROM tsqmi_tsqmi ORDER BY value

panels.title: Histograma de Valores TSQMI (todos os repositórios)

targets.rawSql: SELECT value FROM metrics_collectedmetric WHERE metric_id IN (SELECT id FROM metrics_supportedmetric WHERE metric_type = 'FLOAT') AND qualifier = 'FIL' ORDER BY value

panels.title: Distribuição de Métricas Coletadas por Valor (FLOAT)

targets.rawSql: SELECT r.name AS "Repositório", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY t.value)::numeric,4) AS "P25", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY t.value)::numeric,4) AS "Mediana (P50)", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY t.value)::numeric,4) AS "P75", ROUND((PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY t.value) - PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY t.value))::numeric,4) AS "IQR", ROUND(AVG(t.value)::numeric,4) AS "Média", ROUND(STDDEV(t.value)::numeric,4) AS "Desvio Padrão", ROUND(MIN(t.value)::numeric,4) AS "Mínimo", ROUND(MAX(t.value)::numeric,4) AS "Máximo" FROM tsqmi_tsqmi t JOIN organizations_repository r ON r.id = t.repository_id GROUP BY r.name ORDER BY "Mediana (P50)" DESC

SELECT sc.name AS "Característica", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cc.value)::numeric,4) AS "P25", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cc.value)::numeric,4) AS "Mediana", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cc.value)::numeric,4) AS "P75", ROUND((PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cc.value) - PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cc.value))::numeric,4) AS "IQR", ROUND(AVG(cc.value)::numeric,4) AS "Média", ROUND(STDDEV(cc.value)::numeric,4) AS "Desvio Padrão" FROM characteristics_calculatedcharacteristic cc JOIN characteristics_supportedcharacteristic sc ON sc.id = cc.characteristic_id GROUP BY sc.name ORDER BY "Mediana" DESC
